title: EVGO Stock Price Prediction: Where EVgo Could Be by 2025, 2026, and 2030
text: EVgo, a leading fast-charging infrastructure provider, currently trades at $3.97 per share with a market capitalization of approximately $1.22 billion. The company reported 2024 revenues of $256.8 million, representing 60% year-over-year growth. Price Predictions by Year: 2025—The stock is expected to reach $4.31 by November, an 8.48% increase reflecting continued revenue increases and expanding infrastructure in the fast-charging market, supported by government incentives. 2026—Predictions range between $2.58 and $4.17 per share, with an average forecast of $3.37. The article notes potential volatility, with December potentially seeing the stock down more than 25% below current price. 2030—Optimistic projections suggest EVgo could reach $15 per share, though conservative estimates place it below $1. The average prediction stands around $8, representing a 101% increase from current levels. Key Business Factors: EVgo operates over 850 fast-charging stations across the United States and maintains partnerships with major automakers including General Motors and Nissan. The analysis employs both technical and fundamental approaches.
